mapper.select: SELECT id, kb_id, owner_id, title, source_type, source_uri, size_bytes, status, chunk_count, checksum, tags, error_msg, created_at, updated_at FROM document WHERE kb_id = #{kbId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT id, kb_id, owner_id, title, source_type, source_uri, size_bytes, status, chunk_count, checksum, tags, error_msg, created_at, updated_at FROM document WHERE owner_id = #{ownerId} AND checksum = #{checksum} AND kb_id = #{kbId} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE document SET status = #{status}, error_msg = #{errorMsg}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
